## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting between BaseTen and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BaseTen focuses on high-performance, reliable inference for AI-native products, particularly in real-time applications](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Key differentiators: performance, reliability, engineering expertise, and partnership approach](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Target customers: venture-funded AI startups and companies building AI-native products](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to dominate AEO/SEO for inference, align brand with performance, and showcase customer success stories](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Topics

### BaseTen's Product and Market Position

  - [Specializes in high-performance, reliable inference for AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Focus areas: model performance, reliability in partnership, and infrastructure expertise](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Positioning inference as the backbone of the AI economy](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Competitors: Together AI, Modal, Fireworks, and proprietary hardware solutions (e.g., Grock, Cerebras)](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Differentiators: flexibility in model support, performance optimization, and cost reduction](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Target Customers and Use Cases

  - [Venture-funded AI startups (seed to growth stage)](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [AI-native product companies (e.g., Fathom, Abridge, Mercore, Open Evidence)](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Use cases: code generation, scribes, audio/music generation, chatbots, voice bots](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Customer triggers: new model releases, margin concerns, product launches, performance optimization needs](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Content Strategy and Marketing Challenges

  - [Current focus: technical, in-depth content performing well (e.g., GPU comparisons, LLM guides)](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Need for earlier-stage awareness content to capture companies earlier in their journey](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Bottleneck: limited capacity for producing complex, technical content](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Goal: position BaseTen as the "fast company for inference" in the market](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

### Sales and Customer Acquisition

  - [70% of leads come from events and inbound channels](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Field events and deep technical content are effective](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Challenges in reaching early-stage startups (e.g., Y Combinator crowd)](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Focus on high-leverage accounts for potential 7-8 figure contracts](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Performance Metrics and Goals

  - [Improving AEO/SEO rankings for inference-related terms](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Increasing engagement with top 100 target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Measuring brand association with speed and performance in the inference space](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up recurring meetings between BaseTen and GrowthX teams](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3622.0)
  - [GrowthX to share initial content strategy ideas based on kick-off discussion](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3622.0)
  - [Calibrate content approach on the spectrum from thought leadership to technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3604.0)
  - [Begin scaling technical content production to address BaseTen's capacity constraints](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Develop strategies to capture earlier-stage startups and high-leverage accounts](https://fathom.video/share/puXh5W1ePGz5SMcxGzkzsaporiA4WLxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
